title: DeepSeek V4 Analysis..
summary: Caleb Writes Code analyzes DeepSeek V4, highlighting its breakthrough in reducing inference costs and computational demands. The analysis positions V4 as a major development in the open versus closed AI lab competition, suggesting divergent national incentives are driving efficiency gains in LLM design.
